positive: A whimsical, stylized portrait of a friendly, bioluminescent owl perched on a stack of celestial books. The owl has large, expressive eyes and soft, detailed feather textures. Surrounding elements include swirling nebula patterns, crescent moons, and minimalist geometric constellations, rendered in deep indigo, sapphire blue, forest green, and ethereal gold. Composition must be centered and highly symmetrical, utilizing strong silhouettes and crisp linework for apparel printing. Studio lighting, high contrast, graphic illustration style, vector art quality, perfect for textile transfer.
negative: blur, low resolution, artifacts, text, signature, watermark, logos, blurry edges, out of focus, grainy, bad anatomy, extra limbs, poor details
